name: dev-servers
title: Dev Servers
description: Project-grouped dashboard to manage dev servers. Detects the framework (Next, Svelte, Astro, Vite, Shopify) and restarts with the right package manager (npm, pnpm, yarn, bun). Kill individually or by project, open in browser, copy URLs, and track uptime.
author: tavlean

preferences.name: terminalApp
preferences.title: Terminal App
preferences.description: Which terminal to open when using "Open in Terminal". Defaults to macOS Terminal if unset.

preferences.name: editorApp
preferences.title: Editor App
preferences.description: Which editor to open a project in with "Open in Editor" (e.g. VS Code, Cursor, Zed). The action is hidden when unset.

commands.name: index
commands.title: Dev Servers
commands.description: List and manage running dev servers

preferences.name: refreshInterval
preferences.title: Refresh Interval
preferences.description: How often to refresh the server list

preferences.name: showFullPath
preferences.title: Project Display
preferences.label: Show full directory path
preferences.description: Show the full path instead of the project name

preferences.name: showUptime
preferences.title: Row Accessories
preferences.label: Show uptime
preferences.description: Show how long each server has been running

preferences.name: showBranch
preferences.label: Show git branch
preferences.description: Show the current git branch next to each server when the project is a git repo

preferences.name: showTool
preferences.label: Show framework tag
preferences.description: Show the framework / tool tag (Vite, SvelteKit, Astro, etc.) on each row

preferences.name: showLocalUrl
preferences.label: Show localhost URL with custom domain
preferences.description: When a custom domain (e.g. via portless) points at a dev server, also show the localhost:PORT pill alongside it

commands.name: start
commands.title: Start Dev Server
commands.description: Start a dev server from a Finder selection, a recent project, or any folder you pick

preferences.name: autoOpenInBrowser
preferences.title: After Start
preferences.label: Open in browser when the port binds
preferences.description: Once the new dev server starts listening, automatically open its URL in your default browser

preferences.name: confirmMultiStart
preferences.title: Confirmations
preferences.label: Confirm when starting multiple folders at once
preferences.description: Show a confirmation alert before spawning more than one dev server from a multi-folder Finder selection

commands.name: menubar
commands.title: Dev Servers Menu Bar
commands.description: See running dev servers in the menu bar; kill, restart, open, or start one from the dropdown

preferences.name: showCount
preferences.title: Menu Bar
preferences.label: Show running-server count
preferences.description: Show the number of running dev servers next to the menu bar icon
